Formerly: BMGT757.

BUMK758 Special Topics in Marketing (1-4 Credits)

Selected advanced topics in the various fields of graduate study in marketing.

Restriction: Permission of BMGT-Robert H. Smith School of Business. Repeatable to: 9 credits.

Formerly: BMGT798.

BUMK759 Independent Study in Marketing (1-6 Credits) Independent study for Masters students in Marketing. Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.
